Name: RING_PARAM
Description: Defines properties and modifiers for rings, including weight, durability, repair cost, and item drop rate effects.

Fields.Name: Weight (kg)
Fields.Description: Weight of the ring in kilograms.

Fields.Name: Durability
Fields.Description: Durability value of the ring before it breaks or becomes unusable.

Fields.Name: Repair Cost (Souls)
Fields.Description: Amount of souls required to repair the ring.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Rate Modifier
Fields.Description: Modifier affecting item drop rate; value is scaled by 0.01.
